title: CREATE : together
description: A small create modpack made by friends perfected for multiplayer rp and overall having fun.
body:
# ✨ Welcome to CREATE : together! ✨

Grab your friends, unleash your creativity, and dive into a world where engineering meets artistry! This modpack is built around the legendary CREATE mod and its many add-ons, giving you endless possibilities for mechanical wonders.

But it’s not just about gears and contraptions—your world deserves to look stunning too! With mods like Chipped, Cluttered, Clutter, Adorn, and many more, you’ll have all the tools to build breathtaking structures and immersive environments.

On top of that, a suite of quality-of-life and optimization mods ensures a smooth, enjoyable experience. Whether you're crafting intricate machines, decorating your dream home, or diving deep into roleplay, this modpack is designed to let you create your own stories in a vibrant survival RP world.

## 💡 This is my first modpack, and I’m open to all feedback, ideas, and suggestions! Join my Discord server and let’s make this experience even better together! 🚀
